Since Enaldinho won, let 's fill up the aquarium for the Vini and Jesse team. Oh wow, Vini has really changed. Hey everyone, you really need to take a close look at this because it appears that after all that effort, she has finally decided to throw in the towel and give up entirely. She finally surrendered. We emerged victorious! As you saw, both Bruno and I won. Man, just to get there ... Congratulations, Enaldinho, you 're the best, man!
